entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-05-30: How AI is changing what satellites can do in orbit: Muon Space President Gregory Smirin and Voyager Technologies CEO Dylan Taylor discuss how satellites are evolving from simple data collectors into more capable systems that can process information in orbit. From wildfire detection to always-on connectivity and future orbital data centers, they explain how AI and real-time analytics are expanding what space-based infrastructure can do. Watch the conversation from CNBC's CONVERGE LIVE in Singapore.. 2026-05-30: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next: Analysts see 2026 as a period of consolidation for the sector, as excitement over Europe's increased defense budget is replaced by company-specific drivers. . 2026-05-30: DOJ seeks Judge Eleanor Ross recusal in Georgia election case, citing reports she was disciplined: The DOJ is suing Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensberger over his refusal to give the department election records.. 2026-05-30: Analysis: An end to the Iran war may be just the beginning of a new era of U.S. inequality: Stocks have boomed while consumers have paid the costs of high energy prices.. 2026-05-30: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising, but past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed.. 2026-05-30: China is 'losing a chance' by not being at the Shangri-La Dialogue: German defense chief: Dialogue is still occurring with the members of the Chinese delegation at the forum, \but of course, it would be better to have it on a higher level,\"". 2026-05-30: The Philippines is in for a 'long-term struggle' with China over territory, Manila's defense secretary tells CNBC: The Philippines is going to be locked in a long-term struggle with China over the South China Sea, the country's national defense secretary tells CNBC.. 2026-05-30: U.S. support for Taiwan reaffirmed by members of Congress even after Trump called arms sales a 'negotiating chip' with China: President Donald Trump has referred to $14 billion in arms sales to the island, which has been approved by Congress, as a \negotiating chip\" with China.". 2026-05-30: U.S. is right to ask allies to spend more on defense, Dutch deputy PM says: Five years ago, the Dutch public wouldn't have supported such an increase in defense spending, she said, but that is not the case after Russia invaded Ukraine.. 2026-05-30: Hegseth praises Asian allies for 'burden-sharing,' calls out China's role in the region: Hegseth said that China cannot impose its hegemony on U.S. partners and allies in the region.
